role_title: Associate Manager, Sales Strategy & Operations, Commerce Platform

seniority.level: Mid-level / Associate Manager (IC or people manager unclear)
level_signals: Reports to Senior Manager of Sales Strategy & Operations
Base range $105,400–$155,000 consistent with mid-level at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4+ years of experience in any of the following fields: sales/business planning, strategy & operations, business consulting, analytics
You have a proven track record of leading cross-functional initiatives, hitting goals, and succeeding in a complex and fast moving environment
You have a bachelor's degree or higher
You're an excellent analytical thinker who can deliver actionable recommendations out of complex datasets; SQL experience strongly preferred as is experience with Salesforce/Excel
You map complex operational workflows, diagnose data gaps, and architect AI-driven solutions end-to-end—from process discovery through prototype to production deployment.
You build in AI tooling (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) and ship real automation that eliminates manual work, closes visibility gaps, and accelerates decision-making across the business.

You think in systems, not features. You treat every broken process as a build opportunity and every data gap as a use case waiting to be deployed. This is not an AI-curious role; this is an AI-native operating environment where you are expected to build, test, and iterate continuously.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: SQL experience strongly preferred as is experience with Salesforce/Excel

scope.surface: Digital Ordering (white-label commission-free ordering solution for SMB merchants); Commerce Platform / Account Development Strategy & Operations
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / marketplace platform (DoorDash selling technology solutions to SMB restaurants)
primary_metrics_inferred: SMB merchant acquisition and digital ordering adoption
core_responsibilities: Translate high-level company objectives into actionable quarterly sales goals
Establish and run Weekly Business Reviews and operational governance cadence
Implement tooling and systems updates to improve sales efficiency
Optimize sales funnel through measurement and inspection
Lead discovery and implementation of AI tools to drive productivity improvements

green_flags: Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Clear reporting structure (reports to Senior Manager)
Specific product surface defined (Digital Ordering / Commerce Platform)
Applications accepted on an ongoing basis — low urgency pressure
red_flags: Work location not specified in role body — unclear whether remote, hybrid, or onsite
The AI-native expectation ('build, test, and iterate continuously') is unusually prescriptive and may indicate a high-pressure, rapidly changing environment
SQL listed as 'strongly preferred' but extracted as nice-to-have — border case; may be treated as hard requirement in screening
